infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GymBro needs your location to track your runs and provide real-time coaching.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GymBro needs background location access to track your runs even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GymBro needs microphone access for voice conversations with your AI running buddy.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: GymBro uses motion sensors to detect your activity and provide accurate step counting.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GymBro needs your location to track runs and provide coaching.

plugins.motionPermission: GymBro uses motion data for step counting and activity detection.
